title: How to find the position of a character in text
task: Return the numeric position where a character or substring first appears in a cell.

excel.note: FIND is case-sensitive; SEARCH is case-insensitive and allows wildcards.

explanation: FIND(find_text, within_text) returns the 1-based position of the first match. In 'AB-123' the dash is the 3rd character, so it returns 3. FIND errors with #VALUE! if the character isn't present - wrap in IFERROR to return a fallback.
